gpu_poll.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Sibyl GPU poll: wait for free GPUs (LOCAL)
# Candidates: [0,1], threshold: 2000MB, mode: aggressive (<25% VRAM)
# Poll every 600s, unlimited attempts

MARKER="/tmp/sibyl_sae-absorption_06c3591c2e_gpu_free.json"
rm -f "$MARKER"

i=0
while true; do
    i=$((i + 1))
    OUTPUT=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits 2>/dev/null)
    if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
        echo "[poll $i] nvidia-smi failed, retrying in 600s..."
        sleep 600
        continue
    fi

    # Parse free GPUs
    FREE_GPUS=""
    while IFS=',' read -r idx mem total; do
        idx=$(echo "$idx" | tr -d ' ')
        mem=$(echo "$mem" | tr -d ' ')
        total=$(echo "$total" | tr -d ' ')
        # Check if this GPU is in our candidate list
        case ",0,1," in
            *",$idx,"*)
                if [ "$mem" -lt 2000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
                    if [ -z "$FREE_GPUS" ]; then
                        FREE_GPUS="$idx"
                    else
                        FREE_GPUS="$FREE_GPUS,$idx"
                    fi
                fi
        # Aggressive mode: also claim GPUs with <25% VRAM usage
        if [ -n "$total" ] && [ "$total" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
            pct=$(( mem * 100 / total ))
            if [ "$pct" -lt 25 ] 2>/dev/null; then
                if [ -z "$FREE_GPUS" ]; then
                    FREE_GPUS="$idx"
                else
                    FREE_GPUS="$FREE_GPUS,$idx"
                fi
            fi
        fi
                ;;
        esac
    done <<< "$OUTPUT"

    if [ -n "$FREE_GPUS" ]; then
        echo "[poll $i] Found free GPUs: $FREE_GPUS"
        echo "{\"free_gpus\": [$FREE_GPUS], \"poll_count\": $i}" > "$MARKER"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo "[poll $i] No free GPUs (all above 2000MB), waiting 600s..."
    sleep 600
done

resume_action.description: 轮询等待空闲 GPU（最多 2 张，每 10min 通过本地 nvidia-smi检查，无限等待）（流氓模式：<25% 显存占用也抢）
resume_action.execution_script:
## EXECUTION: gpu_poll
**Priority: execute gpu_poll.script directly**
1. Write script to /tmp/sibyl_gpu_poll.sh
2. Bash(run_in_background): bash /tmp/sibyl_gpu_poll.sh
3. Poll marker_file='/tmp/sibyl_sae-absorption_06c3591c2e_gpu_free.json' every 600s
4. On exit 0 (GPU found): re-run cli_next() for experiment task
5. On exit 1 (max 0 attempts): keep polling (永不放弃)

pending_hooks.name: lark_sync
pending_hooks.resume_hint: restart the sibyl-lark-sync background agent before continuing the loop

breadcrumb.description: 轮询等待空闲 GPU（最多 2 张，每 10min 通过本地 nvidia-smi检查，无限等待）（流氓模式：<25% 显存占用也抢）
